name: Baccardi Rum Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Vanilla pudding mix; 3.4 ozs (or French vanilla pudding mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a bundt pan.
2. Sprinkle pecans evenly on the bottom of the pan.
3. Mix the remaining ingredients well and pour over the nuts.
4. Bake at 350 degrees until a toothpick comes out clean. Remove from oven and let sit for a few minutes.
5. Invert onto a rack.
6. Using an icepick, poke holes all over the cake (top, sides, and bottom).
7. Place back into the bundt pan.
8. Rum Sauce: In a saucepan, combine butter, water, and sugar; bring to a boil for 5 minutes. Stir in Baccardi Rum and let cool completely. Pour over the cake and let sit several minutes to soak up the syrup.
9. Invert onto a serving tray.
Note: The person I got this recipe from said she likes to let the cake set for 2 days before serving. You may decrease the amount of rum used if you think the flavor is too intense; just use half of the Rum Sauce.
